task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Floreant POS Back Office.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Floreant POS Back Office dashboard or interface is visible, indicating successful login (which requires PIN 1111).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Configuration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Configuration' window, dialog, or screen is open within the Floreant POS application.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Print settings tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Print' tab (or similar print-related section) is active and selected within the Configuration window.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the exact required Wi-Fi information into the receipt footer field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field for the receipt/ticket footer message contains exactly 'Wi-Fi: DinerGuest / Pass: pancakes24'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Apply', or 'OK' button in the Configuration window, or the configuration window is closed after the text was entered, returning to the main dashboard.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Floreant POS graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is clicking through the Floreant POS application windows and tabs, rather than using a terminal or command-line interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL UPDATE commands (e.g., modifying the TICKET_FOOTER_MESSAGE column in the RESTAURANT table directly).

integrity.description: Verify the text was entered into the actual POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The target text is typed into the Floreant POS Configuration window, not into a separate text editor, notepad, or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The default PIN for the Floreant POS Back Office is 1111. The receipt footer message setting is located in the Configuration -> Print tab of the Back Office GUI. The underlying database table modified by this action is RESTAURANT and the column is TICKET_FOOTER_MESSAGE.
